name: Chicken Fricassee with Red Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 Garlic cloves, peeled and cut into 4 pieces each
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saute pan, heat the sliced onion over medium until it turns deep gold.
2. Add olive oil and garlic to the pan, stirring occasionally.
3. Incorporate shredded cabbage, salt, and stir well to coat evenly.
4. Cover the pan and simmer for 40 minutes, turning occasionally, until the cabbage is tender and reduced in volume.
5. Rinse the chicken pieces and pat them dry with a paper towel.
6. Heat olive oil in a separate pan over medium heat.
7. Add the chicken skin-side down and brown both sides thoroughly.
8. Transfer the chicken to the pan with the cabbage mixture.
9. Pour in the red wine, add several grinds of black pepper, cover the pan, and continue cooking for about 45 minutes until the chicken is very tender and the cabbage has melted into a dark sauce.
10. Serve hot; this dish serves 2-4 people.
